question: 近30天内，各服务区日均营收排名前5的服务区名称及日均营收额
sql: SELECT s.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, AVG(b.pay_sum) AS 日均营收额 FROM bss_business_day_data b JOIN bss_service_area s ON b.service_no = s.service_area_no WHERE b.oper_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY s.service_area_name ORDER BY 日均营收额 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 对比分析今日与昨日各支付方式（微信、支付宝、现金、刷卡、京东）的收入差异，显示差值
sql: SELECT '微信' AS 支付方式, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(wx), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(wx), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS 收入差值 UNION ALL SELECT '支付宝' AS 支付方式, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(zfb), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(zfb), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS 收入差值 UNION ALL SELECT '现金' AS 支付方式, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rmb), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rmb), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS 收入差值 UNION ALL SELECT '刷卡' AS 支付方式, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(xs), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(xs), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS 收入差值 UNION ALL SELECT '京东' AS 支付方式, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(jd), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(jd), 0) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS 收入差值;

question: 查询未被逻辑删除且近7天有营业记录的所有档口明细，包括档口名、所属服务区、最近一次营业日期及当日订单总数
sql: SELECT br.branch_name AS 档口名称, sa.service_area_name AS 所属服务区, b.oper_date AS 最近营业日期, b.order_sum AS 当日订单总数 FROM bss_business_day_data b JOIN bss_branch br ON b.branch_no = br.branch_no JOIN bss_service_area sa ON b.service_no = sa.service_area_no WHERE b.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.oper_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' AND (b.branch_no, b.oper_date) IN (SELECT branch_no, MAX(oper_date) FROM bss_business_day_data WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY branch_no) ORDER BY 最近营业日期 DESC, 档口名称;

question: 查询所有状态为‘开放’的服务区名称、编码及其所属路线名称，并按服务区名称升序排列
sql: SELECT sa.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, sa.service_area_no AS 服务区编码, sr.route_name AS 所属路线名称 FROM public.bss_service_area sa JOIN public.bss_section_route_area_link link ON sa.id = link.service_area_id JOIN public.bss_section_route sr ON link.section_route_id = sr.id WHERE sa.service_state = '开放' ORDER BY sa.service_area_name;

question: 统计每个公司下辖的服务区数量，并仅显示服务区数量超过2个的公司ID及对应数量
sql: SELECT sa.company_id AS 公司ID, COUNT(*) AS 服务区数量 FROM public.bss_service_area sa WHERE sa.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY sa.company_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;

question: 列出所有在‘驿美’系统中有映射记录且类型为‘信息化服务区’的服务区名称、编码、经纬度及映射来源系统类型
sql: SELECT sa.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, sa.service_area_no AS 服务区编码, sa.service_position AS 经纬度, sam.source_system_type AS 映射来源系统类型 FROM public.bss_service_area sa JOIN public.bss_service_area_mapper sam ON sa.id = sam.service_area_id WHERE sam.source_system_type = '驿美' AND sa.service_area_type = '信息化服务区' AND sa.delete_ts IS NULL AND sam.delete_ts IS NULL;

question: 请列出2023年4月1日各服务区的总营业额（pay_sum）和订单总数（order_sum），按营业额从高到低排序，仅显示前5名。
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, pay_sum AS 总营业额, order_sum AS 订单总数 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date = '2023-04-01' ORDER BY pay_sum DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 统计2023年4月所有服务区每日微信支付金额（wx）与支付宝支付金额（zfb）的合计值，并筛选出微信收入高于支付宝收入且当日总支付额（pay_sum）超过5000元的日期。
sql: SELECT oper_date AS 统计日期, SUM(wx) AS 微信总收款, SUM(zfb) AS 支付宝总收款, SUM(pay_sum) AS 当日总营收 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE oper_date >= '2023-04-01' AND oper_date <= '2023-04-30' GROUP BY oper_date HAVING SUM(wx) > SUM(zfb) AND SUM(pay_sum) > 5000 ORDER BY oper_date;

question: 对比分析宜春服务区与庐山服务区在2023年4月1日至4月7日期间各支付渠道（微信、支付宝、现金、刷卡、京东）的平均单笔订单金额（即各渠道金额/订单数，需处理除零），结果按渠道和服务区分组并排序。
sql: SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, '微信' AS 支付渠道, COALESCE(AVG(wx / NULLIF(wx_order, 0)), 0) AS 平均单笔金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name IN ('宜春服务区', '庐山服务区') AND oper_date BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-04-07' GROUP BY service_name UNION ALL SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, '支付宝' AS 支付渠道, COALESCE(AVG(zfb / NULLIF(zf_order, 0)), 0) AS 平均单笔金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name IN ('宜春服务区', '庐山服务区') AND oper_date BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-04-07' GROUP BY service_name UNION ALL SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, '现金' AS 支付渠道, COALESCE(AVG(rmb / NULLIF(rmb_order, 0)), 0) AS 平均单笔金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name IN ('宜春服务区', '庐山服务区') AND oper_date BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-04-07' GROUP BY service_name UNION ALL SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, '刷卡' AS 支付渠道, COALESCE(AVG(xs / NULLIF(xs_order, 0)), 0) AS 平均单笔金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name IN ('宜春服务区', '庐山服务区') AND oper_date BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-04-07' GROUP BY service_name UNION ALL SELECT service_name AS 服务区名称, '京东' AS 支付渠道, COALESCE(AVG(jd / NULLIF(jd_order, 0)), 0) AS 平均单笔金额 FROM public.bss_business_day_data WHERE service_name IN ('宜春服务区', '庐山服务区') AND oper_date BETWEEN '2023-04-01' AND '2023-04-07' GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY 服务区名称, 支付渠道;

question: 统计2022年3月各车型在所有服务区的日均车辆使用数量，并按数量从高到低排序
sql: SELECT car_type AS 车型, AVG(customer_count) AS 日均车辆数 FROM public.bss_car_day_count WHERE count_date >= '2022-03-01' AND count_date <= '2022-03-31' AND delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY car_type ORDER BY 日均车辆数 DESC;

question: 找出2022年单日车辆使用量最高的前5个记录，显示日期、车型、车辆数量及对应服务区ID
sql: SELECT count_date AS 统计日期, car_type AS 车型, customer_count AS 车辆数量, service_area_id AS 服务区ID FROM public.bss_car_day_count WHERE delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 对比分析‘小型客车’与‘货车’在2022年第一季度（1-3月）的总使用量差异，要求返回两类车型各自的汇总数量及差值
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN car_type = '小型客车' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) AS 小型客车总量, SUM(CASE WHEN car_type = '货车' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) AS 货车总量, SUM(CASE WHEN car_type = '小型客车' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN car_type = '货车' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) AS 数量差值 FROM public.bss_car_day_count WHERE count_date >= '2022-01-01' AND count_date <= '2022-03-31' AND car_type IN ('小型客车', '货车') AND delete_ts IS NULL;

question: 查询所有未被逻辑删除的分公司名称及其编码，并按创建时间倒序排列，仅显示前10条记录
sql: SELECT company_name AS "公司名称", company_no AS "公司编码", create_ts AS "创建时间" FROM public.bss_company WHERE delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY create_ts DESC LIMIT 10;

question: 统计各分公司（按公司编码分组）的记录数量及最新更新时间，仅保留记录数大于1的分公司
sql: SELECT company_no AS "公司编码", COUNT(*) AS "记录数量", MAX(update_ts) AS "最新更新时间" FROM public.bss_company WHERE delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY company_no HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

question: 对比分析：列出创建人和最后更新人不一致的分公司信息，显示公司名称、公司编码、创建人、更新人及版本号
sql: SELECT company_name AS "公司名称", company_no AS "公司编码", created_by AS "创建人", updated_by AS "更新人", version AS "版本号" FROM public.bss_company WHERE delete_ts IS NULL AND created_by != updated_by;

question: 统计各服务区中餐饮档口的数量，并按数量降序排列，仅显示档口数大于1的服务区
sql: SELECT sa.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, COUNT(b.id) AS 餐饮档口数量 FROM public.bss_branch b JOIN public.bss_service_area sa ON b.service_area_id = sa.id WHERE b.classify = '餐饮' AND b.delete_ts IS NULL GROUP BY sa.service_area_name HAVING COUNT(b.id) > 1 ORDER BY 餐饮档口数量 DESC;

question: 列出所有手工录入的餐饮档口信息，包括档口名称、品牌、所属服务区名称及方向，按创建时间倒序排列
sql: SELECT b.branch_name AS 档口名称, b.product_brand AS 品牌, sa.service_area_name AS 服务区名称, b.direction AS 方向, b.create_ts AS 创建时间 FROM public.bss_branch b JOIN public.bss_service_area sa ON b.service_area_id = sa.id WHERE b.is_manual_entry = 1 AND b.classify = '餐饮' AND b.delete_ts IS NULL ORDER BY b.create_ts DESC;

question: 对比南区与西区餐饮档口的平均档口数量（按服务区维度），要求只统计至少有2个餐饮档口的服务区，并显示区域名称和平均档口数
sql: SELECT sub.direction AS 区域名称, AVG(sub.branch_count) AS 平均档口数量 FROM (SELECT b.service_area_id, b.direction, COUNT(*) AS branch_count FROM public.bss_branch b WHERE b.classify = '餐饮' AND b.delete_ts IS NULL AND b.direction IN ('南区', '西区') GROUP BY b.service_area_id, b.direction HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AS sub GROUP BY sub.direction;
